graded_findings.rationale: The gather found that the canonical dscli command reference omits the new logs subcommand and its documented options. For a user-facing CLI addition, missing command reference coverage is a substantive documentation adherence gap.

The gather found the spec describes a different log path contract than the implementation uses. A stale or contradictory design spec for a new command can mislead implementation review and future maintenance, so this should block merge.

The changed CLI registration is not exercised through the dscli parser/import dispatch path, so a broken or missing logs registration could still pass. That is a real test adherence gap for the behavior introduced by the change.
